race.comment: VOLTESSA (12) is knocking on the door after a strong second here over 1200m, finishing just over a length away from the winner. She looks ready for the rise in trip, and with the winkers on for the first time, she can go one better. LEGAL CAUSE (3) surprised many at big odds last start when going down narrowly at Doomben over 1200m. That run followed on from a sound third at Kilcoy, and as a lightly tried 5YO gelding, his best has yet to come. Stick with him. INQUICKTIME (7) never came into it last start over 1400m at Eagle Farm just over a month ago in a stronger field, but this is a softer assignment, and his previous form suggests he can bounce back and figure in the top 3 here. AWARDED DIFFERENCE (5) finished last of 4 runners on debut here 16 days ago on a heavy track. The blinkers go on, and he is worth including in all top 4 combos in this even field.
